dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noCoursesDesc: You're not enrolled in any courses. Contact your school to get started.

course.getStartedDesc: Complete these steps to set up your course for students.

courseSettings.title: Course Settings
courseSettings.k2Desc: Icons only, large touch targets, no text labels
courseSettings.threeToFiveDesc: Icons + text, larger UI, simplified navigation
courseSettings.navigationDesc: Reorder tabs using the arrows. Toggle visibility to show or hide tabs from students. The first 6 visible tabs appear in the primary navigation bar; the rest appear under "More".
courseSettings.gradingScaleDesc: Customize the letter grade boundaries for this course. Percentages are minimum thresholds (e.g., 93% means scores of 93% and above earn that grade).
courseSettings.weightFinalGrade: Weight final grade based on assignment groups
courseSettings.setMinGrade: Set a minimum grade for late submissions
courseSettings.autoGradeMissing: Automatically apply a grade for missing submissions
courseSettings.settingsSavedPartial: Settings saved, but failed to save: {{items}}. Please try again.

modules.title: Modules
modules.noModulesDesc: Click "+ Module" above to create your first module.
modules.deleteModuleConfirm: Delete this module and all its items?

moduleSettings.title: Module Settings — {{name}}
moduleSettings.sequentialProgress: Require students to complete items in the listed order
moduleSettings.sequentialProgressDesc: Students will only be able to access the next module item after completing the previous one.
moduleSettings.prerequisitesDesc: Students must complete these modules before they can access this one.
moduleSettings.requirementsDesc: Set completion requirements for individual items. Students must fulfill these to complete the module.
moduleSettings.noItemsForRequirements: No items to set requirements on. Add items to this module first.

loginPage.passwordResetSentHint: If an account exists with that email, a password reset link has been sent. Check your email or contact your administrator.
loginPage.passwordResetSuccess: Password has been reset successfully. You can now log in.
loginPage.forgotInstruction: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
loginPage.coppaNoticeIntro: By signing in, you agree to our

dashboardPage.notEnrolledYet: You are not enrolled in any courses yet. Browse the catalog to get started.

quizTakePage.question: Question {{current}} of {{total}}
quizTakePage.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit?
quizTakePage.confirmSubmitDesc: You will not be able to change your answers after submitting.

inboxPage.title: Inbox
inboxPage.subject: Subject
inboxPage.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view messages

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.emptyHint: You'll see notifications here when something happens in your courses.

parentalConsentPage.invalidLinkDesc: This consent link is no longer valid. It may have expired or already been used.
parentalConsentPage.invalidLinkContact: If you believe this is an error, please contact your child's school administrator.
parentalConsentPage.consentGrantedThanks: Thank you for providing consent for {{name}}.
parentalConsentPage.consentGrantedItem1: Your child's account at {{school}} is now fully active
parentalConsentPage.consentGrantedItem2: They can sign in and access all course materials
parentalConsentPage.consentGrantedItem3: You can withdraw consent at any time by contacting the school
parentalConsentPage.consentDeniedSummary: You have chosen not to provide consent for {{name}}.
parentalConsentPage.deniedItem1: Your child's account will be limited and may not have full access to course features
parentalConsentPage.deniedItem2: No personal information beyond basic enrollment will be stored
parentalConsentPage.deniedItem3: Teachers may need to provide alternative participation methods
parentalConsentPage.deniedItem4: You can change your decision at any time by contacting the school
parentalConsentPage.deniedQuestions: Questions? Contact your child's school administrator.
parentalConsentPage.subtitle: Paper LMS - Student Data Privacy
parentalConsentPage.requestDesc: {{school}} uses Paper LMS as its learning management system. Because your child is under 13 years of age, the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) requires parental consent before collecting personal information.
parentalConsentPage.rightsIntro: As a parent or legal guardian, you have the right to:
parentalConsentPage.trustFooter: Paper LMS is committed to protecting student privacy in compliance with COPPA, FERPA, and applicable state laws.

publicPage.notFoundDescription: This page doesn't exist or is not publicly available.

myBadgesPage.title: My badges
myBadgesPage.subtitle: Badges your teachers have awarded you, or that you earned automatically.
myBadgesPage.emptyDescription: Keep going! Badges get awarded for completed work, sustained streaks, or by your teacher.

gamificationPreferencesPage.title: Gamification preferences
gamificationPreferencesPage.subtitle: Control how your progress is visible to peers. These settings only affect what others see — they don’t change your wallet, awards, or mastery.
gamificationPreferencesPage.hideDescription: When this is on, you’ll be excluded from leaderboards your classmates can see. Your XP, gems, mastery points, and badges are not affected — you keep everything you’ve earned, and rules still award you progress as usual. You can turn this back off any time.

passkeyListPage.title: Your passkeys
passkeyListPage.emptyState: You have no passkeys yet. Add one to sign in without a password.
passkeyListPage.revokeConfirm: Revoke this passkey? You will no longer be able to sign in with this device.

itemAnalysis.title: Item Analysis
itemAnalysis.noDataDescription: Detailed item analysis appears here once students have submitted attempts. Aggregations include % correct, per-option distribution (MC/MA/dropdown), average points earned, and items still pending manual grading.

itemBankManager.title: Item Banks
itemBankManager.description: Reusable question pools. Add items to any quiz, or use random draw for variety.
itemBankManager.noBanks: No banks yet. Create your first bank above.
itemBankManager.selectBank: Select a bank to view items
itemBankManager.pickBank: Pick a bank on the left to inspect its items.
itemBankManager.noItemsYet: No items yet in this bank.
itemBankManager.deleteConfirm: Delete bank "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.

stimulusEditor.title: Stimulus Passages
stimulusEditor.description: Reusable reading passages, prompts, or diagrams that questions can link to.
stimulusEditor.contentPlaceholder: Type or paste the passage here…
stimulusEditor.noLinkedQuestions: No questions are currently linked to this stimulus. From any quiz question editor, use the "Link to stimulus passage" dropdown to attach this passage.
stimulusEditor.emptyList: No stimuli yet. Click "New Stimulus" to create your first passage.
stimulusEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{title}}"? Linked questions will keep working but lose the passage.

superAdminSettings.title: Super-Admin Settings
superAdminSettings.subtitle: Changes here affect the entire deployment. Per-tenant overrides land at account scope; per-deployment defaults land at instance scope.
superAdminSettings.testTitle: Run a live {{action}} test using the current effective configuration
superAdminSettings.confirmSecretSuffix: The stored encrypted credential will be discarded.
superAdminSettings.confirmChainNote: Future reads will fall through to the next scope in the chain (account → instance → env → default).
superAdminSettings.chooseAccountId: Choose an Account ID at the top of the page.
superAdminSettings.setOidcFirst: Set the OIDC redirect base first.
superAdminSettings.hintEnv: Configured via environment variable. Set a value here to override.
superAdminSettings.hintDefault: No explicit value set anywhere; shipping default in use.
superAdminSettings.hintNone: Nothing in the resolution chain set this value.

contentImport.title: Import Content
contentImport.description: Import course content from Canvas exports (.imscc), Common Cartridge packages, or QTI quiz files.

gradingPeriods.title: Grading Periods
gradingPeriods.noPeriodsInGroup: No grading periods in this group.

assignmentOverrides.titlePlaceholder: Override title (e.g., 'Extended time for Section A')
assignmentOverrides.empty: No overrides. All students use the default dates.

notificationPreferences.title: Notification Preferences
notificationPreferences.subtitle: Control how and when you receive notifications.
notificationPreferences.deliveryPolicyDescription: Choose how frequently you want to receive notification summaries.
notificationPreferences.notificationTypesDescription: Enable or disable specific notification categories.

notify_new_message.label: New Message
notify_new_message.description: Get notified when you receive a new message or conversation reply.

notify_event_start.label: Calendar Event Reminders
notify_event_start.description: Get reminded when a calendar event is about to start.

notify_submission_grade.label: Submission Grade Updates
notify_submission_grade.description: Get notified when an assignment or quiz submission is graded.

notify_new_announcement.label: New Announcements
notify_new_announcement.description: Get notified when a new announcement is posted in your courses.
